introSection: Moto Bala is a Zamperla launched motorbike roller coaster located at Mundo Petapa in Guatemala City, Guatemala. Bala is Spanish for Bullet.

sections.title: Trains
sections.content: 2 trains with 6 cars per train. Riders are arranged 2 across in a single row for a total of 12 riders per train.

fullText:
Moto Bala is a Zamperla launched motorbike roller coaster located at Mundo Petapa in Guatemala City, Guatemala. Bala is Spanish for Bullet.



2 trains with 6 cars per train. Riders are arranged 2 across in a single row for a total of 12 riders per train.
